hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Tarefa concluída!" with title "Claude Code"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Hero.aiff
osascript -e 'display notification "Preciso da sua atenção!" with title "Claude Code"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff
osascript -e 'display notification "Esperando sua permissão!" with title "Claude Code"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Ping.aiff
